title: Sitting at the desk where the wealth decisions get made
subtitle: A visualisation for inhabiting the working space of your wealth-building self.
excerpt: A short visualisation practice from Day 23 of the MONEY program. Use to give the wise-wealth-creator identity a physical working location: a desk, a chair, a specific spot where she does her financial thinking.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. Aligned with Day 23 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A five-minute visualisation from Day 23 of the MONEY program. The image is a working space, not a lifestyle shot: a desk, a notebook or screen, the particular quiet of someone who is clear-headed about money and comfortable with it.

Sit down, close your eyes. Picture a desk. It's the desk where the wealth decisions in your life get made. Not a glamorous boardroom, just the right size for you, tidy or a bit cluttered, wherever you do your clearest thinking.

You're sitting at it. In front of you is something that represents a financial decision or a wealth-building task. A spreadsheet, a notebook with a plan written in it, a bank statement you've just reviewed calmly. You're the woman who made this decision. You did it with care. The outcome is sensible and good.
Hold that image for a few breaths. When you're ready, open your eyes and write one sentence about what the decision was.
Original to homemade.education. Aligned with Day 23 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
